reviews.comment:
Un poco de fila, pero en gral tienen de todo y es muy completo para autos y motos. Buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
There's a bit of a line, but they generally have everything and it's very complete for cars and motorcycles. Good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2ekxfWkpnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la atención. Medidas de seguridad malísima. Motoqueros cargando nafta y conductor y acompañante ambos al lado de la moto con celular en mano y nadie dijo nada. Vergonzoso

(Translated by Google)
The service was incredibly slow. The security measures were appalling. Motorcyclists were refueling, and the driver and passenger were both standing next to the motorcycle, each on their cell phone, and nobody said a word. Shameful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2dUxQRTJRRRAB
